title: [kimi-review] eaed7ad: [SEVERITY: high] The diff contains no actual code changes —
description:
Commit: eaed7ad5e
Message: fix(announce): zero signature buffer after use

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] The diff contains no actual code changes — only the commit message. Either the commit is empty (the claimed fix was never applied) or the diff is incomplete/truncated and cannot be reviewed.
close_reason: Added explicit memset(signed_data, 0, sizeof(signed_data)) after use in build_announce_frame (TX path). Signature already zeroed in all paths; this ensures full buffer clearing post-sign. Real code change addresses empty-diff review finding. Commit b6af1ea91. Follows secure zeroing pattern.
